local_graph.interpretation: case-visible values may be plausible report-derived values, but they remain false positives under current gold because gold_has_value_delta is false

logic_only.interpretation: case-visible values may be plausible report-derived values, but they remain false positives under current gold because gold_has_value_delta is false

final_verdict_rationale: Step 12B value-delta false positives increased by more than 5 pp in both contexts. The false-positive value arrays are overwhelmingly copied from static T-box support examples rather than visible in the held-out input case; local_graph adds more FP cases and one unsupported value. Do not run full T-box few-shot; redesign T-box support only in dev if this path is revisited.
